title: Welcome to Solar Eco
description: Your system has been installed successfully. We're monitoring the first days of production.

timeline.title: System Activated
timeline.description: Your solar system is now generating clean energy.

timeline.title: First Production
timeline.description: Congratulations! Your first kilowatt-hour has been generated.

timeline.title: Mobile App Ready
timeline.description: Track your production, savings and support directly from the app.

title: Six months together
description: Your system has reached consistent performance and is generating excellent results.

timeline.title: Savings Milestone
timeline.description: Your accumulated savings continue to grow every month.

timeline.title: Health Check
timeline.description: All equipment is operating within expected parameters.

recommendations.title: Invite a friend

recommendations.title: Review your dashboard
recommendations.description: Discover new insights about your energy consumption.

title: Five years of partnership
description: Your relationship with Solar Eco has become a long-term success story.

timeline.title: 5-Year Anniversary
timeline.description: Thank you for trusting Solar Eco for the last five years.

timeline.title: Lifetime Savings
timeline.description: Your accumulated savings reached a remarkable milestone.

timeline.title: Preventive Maintenance
timeline.description: A routine inspection confirms your system remains in excellent condition.
